offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, budget overruns cause cash flow gaps. We provide real-time budget tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem: Inability to effectively track project budgets and variances.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on budget tracking tools

Forums where contractors share project management tips
try_it: Let users test budget alerts on 1-3 projects
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Share weekly updates in relevant forums
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing expenses
